findings.title: ETH and residual token balances can be permanently trapped in FlawVerifier

best_agent_match.title: All funded ETH and residual tokens are permanently locked

findings.title: Anyone can execute the full treasury strategy without authorization

best_agent_match.title: Anyone can trigger the full trading/probing routine against the contract treasury

findings.title: All swaps use zero minimum output, enabling price-manipulation extraction

best_agent_match.title: Every swap accepts arbitrary output, enabling sandwich and price-manipulation drain

findings.title: Blind low-level probing after approvals can self-inflict irreversible token loss

best_agent_match.title: Blind selector fuzzing after granting approvals can trigger destructive external behavior

rejected_candidates.title: Unlimited approvals to external spenders persist indefinitely
rejected_candidates.reason: The lingering approvals shown here do not by themselves give arbitrary third parties a concrete drain path from this contract, especially for the Uniswap routers; the report depends on unproven spender-side behavior outside the provided code.

rejected_candidates.title: Counter allows arbitrary users to rewrite critical state
rejected_candidates.reason: `Counter.sol` is a minimal sample contract whose only purpose is to expose public mutators; no privileged invariant, treasury, or protocol-critical workflow is present in the provided code.
